android.waived: Android is the POSIX-only path with no tvOS NSUserDefaults layer, so it carries none of the storage risk the change addresses (the risky tvOS path was hardware-proven above). Code verified by 452 tests + three independent agent reviews (impl, adversarial audit, final QA=SHIP). Live capture on the office Fire TV was blocked by its Kodi not staying up.

tvos.waived: Hardware-verified on atv2 (Apple TV) via a full 2026.07.17.5 wipe->restore on 2026-07-17: the skin returned to skin.estuary7 UNAIDED (the fix under test), and POV/SportHD/The Loop/pvr.iptvsimple/script.skinshortcuts all restored, verdict Complete with no false 'needs attention'. Confirmed live over JSON-RPC. verify_device cannot self-capture at 2026.07.17.5 because a restore reverts EZM++ to the backup's older version (2026.07.16.1) by design - the box no longer reports the version under test after the very run that verifies it.
